loginModal.welcomeSubtitle.en: Log in or sign up to continue

loginModal.inviteSubtitle.en: This community action needs a Cloud invite. Enter your invite code before continuing.
loginModal.inviteSubtitle.zh: 这个社区操作需要 Cloud 邀请码，请先填写邀请码再继续。

loginModal.inviteRequired.en: Enter an invite code to unlock this Cloud action.
loginModal.inviteRequired.zh: 请输入邀请码以解锁这个 Cloud 操作。

loginModal.inviteFailed.en: Invite code could not be redeemed. Check the code and try again.
loginModal.inviteFailed.zh: 邀请码兑换失败，请检查后重试。

inviteCodeGate.description.en: Enter an invite code to unlock this action. We will continue after the code is redeemed.
inviteCodeGate.description.zh: 输入邀请码解锁这个操作，兑换成功后会继续执行。

inviteCodeGate.failed.en: Invite code could not be redeemed. Check the code and try again.
inviteCodeGate.failed.zh: 邀请码兑换失败，请检查后重试。

inviteCodeGate.invalid.en: That invite code is invalid or has already been used.
inviteCodeGate.invalid.zh: 邀请码无效或已被使用。

loginModal.passwordSubtitle.en: Use your saved password or enter your account details.
loginModal.passwordSubtitle.zh: 使用已保存的密码，或输入账号和密码登录。

loginModal.passwordResetSent.en: If this email is registered, we sent a password reset link. Open it within 30 minutes.
loginModal.passwordResetSent.zh: 如果该邮箱已注册，我们已发送重设密码邮件。请在 30 分钟内打开链接完成设置。

loginModal.checkEmailMessage.en: We sent a one-time verification code to your inbox:
loginModal.checkEmailMessage.zh: 我们已向您的邮箱发送了一次性验证码，请查看您的收件箱：

loginModal.codeSent.en: Verification code sent. Check your email.
loginModal.codeSent.zh: 验证码已发送，请查看邮箱。

loginModal.termsPrefix.en: By continuing, you agree to the

footer.tagline.en: AI Buddies, shared work, and community apps in one Space.
footer.tagline.zh: 把 Buddy、协作成果和社区应用放在同一个 Space 里。

spaces.directory.metaTitle.zh: 公开社区目录 - 虾豆

spaces.directory.subtitle.en: Browse public Spaces, open their community desktops, and see the announcements, apps, shared work, and Buddy services inside.
spaces.directory.subtitle.zh: 浏览公开 Space，进入社区桌面查看公告、应用、协作成果和 Buddy 服务。

spaces.directory.emptyDescription.zh: 换一个关键词或分类再试试。

spaces.directory.emptyDirectoryDescripti.en: Use the product tour to see how a community desktop, channels, a workspace, apps, and Buddies work together.
spaces.directory.emptyDirectoryDescripti.zh: 先看看不同社区的桌面、频道、应用和 Buddy，再选择感兴趣的社区。

spaces.directory.serverFallbackDescripti.en: Enter this public community from its desktop to explore announcements, apps, shared work, and Buddy services.
spaces.directory.serverFallbackDescripti.zh: 从这个公开社区的桌面进入，浏览公告、应用、协作成果和 Buddy 服务。

spaces.directory.ctaTitle.en: Have a community you want to add to Discovery?
spaces.directory.ctaTitle.zh: 想把自己的社区加入发现页？

download.desktop.metaTitle.zh: 下载虾豆桌面端 - 虾豆

download.desktop.title.en: Run Buddies from your own computer
download.desktop.title.zh: 在自己的电脑上运行 Buddy

download.desktop.subtitle.en: Download the desktop app to connect model providers, manage local Buddies, and link them back to your Shadow Spaces.
download.desktop.subtitle.zh: 下载桌面端，连接模型供应商，管理本地 Buddy，并把它们关联到你的虾豆 Space。

download.desktop.moreOptions.en: Choose a platform or connector method
download.desktop.moreOptions.zh: 选择平台或 Connector 方式

download.desktop.loading.zh: 正在读取最新桌面端版本...

download.desktop.githubFallback.en: Choose a desktop package from the release assets.
download.desktop.githubFallback.zh: 在版本资源里查看可用安装包。

download.desktop.connectorDesktopDescrip.en: Install the desktop app, sign in, and keep Connector enabled on this computer.
download.desktop.connectorDesktopDescrip.zh: 安装桌面端，登录同一账号，并保持这台电脑上的 Connector 开启。

download.desktop.connectorCliDescription.en: Use this when the desktop app cannot be installed on this machine.
download.desktop.connectorCliDescription.zh: 无法在这台机器安装桌面端时，可以用 CLI 手动连接。

home.story.desktop.title.en: Every Space has its own character
home.story.desktop.title.zh: 每个 Space，都有自己的样子

home.story.desktop.description.en: Members enter a Space through its community desktop. Announcements, current activities, channel shortcuts, shared content, and online Buddies all start here.
home.story.desktop.description.zh: 成员进入 Space 后，先看到共同的社区桌面。公告、正在进行的活动、频道入口、分享内容和在线的 Buddy 都从这里开始。

home.story.channels.title.en: Join the topics that interest you

home.story.channels.description.en: Channels separate the conversations inside a community. Members choose which ones to join, follow new discussions, and talk or work with the Buddies already there.
home.story.channels.description.zh: 频道把社区里的不同话题分开。成员选择想参与的频道，关注新的讨论，也能和频道里的 Buddy 一起聊天或处理事情。

home.story.activities.title.en: What you do together stays in the community
home.story.activities.title.zh: 一起做的事，留在社区里

home.story.activities.description.en: Community apps host games, content, and shared activities. Documents, images, and other results remain in the workspace for returning members to find and continue.
home.story.activities.description.zh: 社区应用承载游戏、内容和协作活动；文档、图片等结果留在工作区，之后回来的成员仍能找到并继续。

home.story.platform.description.en: A Buddy has its own identity, presence, and permissions. It can join channels, take part in activities, and bring completed work back to the community.
home.story.platform.description.zh: Buddy 有自己的身份、在线状态和权限。它可以加入频道、参与活动，把完成的内容带回社区。

hero.subtitle.en: Run community Spaces where members, shared work, apps, and AI Buddies stay together.
hero.subtitle.zh: 在同一个 Space 里组织成员、协作成果、应用和 AI Buddy。

home.random.subtitle.en: Start the radar to discover a public community.
home.random.subtitle.zh: 启动雷达，随机发现一个公开社区。

home.random.empty.en: No public communities are available right now
home.random.empty.zh: 暂时没有可用的公开社区

home.random.serverFallbackDesc.en: Enter this public community from its desktop to explore announcements, apps, shared work, and Buddy services.
home.random.serverFallbackDesc.zh: 从这个公开社区的桌面进入，浏览公告、应用、协作成果和 Buddy 服务。

home.hero.subtitle.en: Enter a space community, start from its desktop announcements, apps, shared content, and Buddy services, then join the channels as you settle in.
home.hero.subtitle.zh: 进入感兴趣的空间，从桌面上的公告、应用、分享内容和 Buddy 服务开始，慢慢融入频道里的交流与协作。

home.communityShowcase.title.zh: 看看社区里正在发生什么

home.communityShowcase.description.en: Each Space has its own desktop, channels, apps, and Buddies. Find a community that interests you and step inside.
home.communityShowcase.description.zh: 每个 Space 都有自己的桌面、频道、应用和 Buddy。找到感兴趣的社区，进去看看。

home.communityShowcase.gamingAlt.en: A gaming community coordinating raid night in its Space channel
home.communityShowcase.gamingAlt.zh: 游戏社区在 Space 频道里协调当晚的团队活动

home.communityShowcase.musicAlt.en: A music community with a Buddy rehearsal recap task open
home.communityShowcase.musicAlt.zh: 音乐社区打开了 Buddy 的排练回顾任务

home.communityShowcase.travelAlt.en: A travel community planning a weekend together on its Space desktop
home.communityShowcase.travelAlt.zh: 旅行社区在 Space 桌面上一起规划周末行程

home.hero.poem.line1.en: At the edge of the star sea, a child heard a song under the cedars.
home.hero.poem.line1.zh: 在星海尽头，有个孩子在雪松下听见一支歌。

home.hero.poem.line2.en: The song was thin as moonlight, yet it opened a path through the pine shadows.
home.hero.poem.line2.zh: 那歌声薄得像月光，却在松影间开出一条路。

home.hero.poem.line3.en: The child followed it, and the road grew clearer under each step.
home.hero.poem.line3.zh: 孩子沿着歌声往前走，脚下的路一点点清晰起来。

home.hero.poem.line4.en: A creek ran beside the road, carrying small stars downstream.
home.hero.poem.line4.zh: 一条小溪沿路流向前方，水里带着细碎的星光。

home.hero.poem.line5.en: Far ahead, a village breathed beneath the constellations, each window catching a star.
home.hero.poem.line5.zh: 远处的村庄在星座下呼吸，一扇窗接住一颗星。

home.hero.poem.line6.en: Every lamp seemed to wait, saying, do not be afraid; someone remembers you.
home.hero.poem.line6.zh: 每一盏灯都像在等他说，别怕，这里有人记得你。

home.hero.poem.line7.en: In the square, a quiet band began to play beneath the stars.
home.hero.poem.line7.zh: 广场上，一支安静的乐队在星光下缓缓奏起。

home.hero.poem.line8.en: When the child forgot the words, another voice held the next line.
home.hero.poem.line8.zh: 当孩子忘了词，另一个声音替他接住下一句。

home.hero.poem.line9.en: More voices drew near, like campfires among the trees, warming the dark by degrees.
home.hero.poem.line9.zh: 更多声音慢慢靠近，像林间的篝火，一点点暖过来。

home.hero.poem.line10.en: The song found the echo of companions, and left a lamp inside every heart.
home.hero.poem.line10.zh: 那支歌有了伙伴的回声，在每个人心里留下一盏灯。

home.hero.poem.line11.en: They crossed the old bridge together, carrying the melody over the water.
home.hero.poem.line11.zh: 他们一起走过旧桥，把旋律送到水面那边。

home.hero.poem.line12.en: Back in the village, they kept the hearth burning for anyone still on the road.
home.hero.poem.line12.zh: 回到村里，他们把炉火留给还在路上的人。

home.hero.poem.line13.en: When first light touched the grass, the child finally joined the song.
home.hero.poem.line13.zh: 等第一缕天光碰到草叶，孩子终于跟着大家轻轻唱了起来。

home.hero.poem.line14.en: The song followed the road home to the edge of the star sea, where another child was listening.
home.hero.poem.line14.zh: 那支歌沿着回家的路走向星海尽头，又被另一个孩子听见。
